-0.0113*sin(0.1699*(0.7225 - x_1)**2 - 2.3587*sin(1.137*x_2 - 1.136) + 0.0646) - 0.0165*sin(0.3606*exp(1.1856*x_1) - 1.3087*sin(1.4132*x_2 + 4.5774) + 5.2177) - 0.0187*sin(1.6465*exp(0.8749*x_2) + 1.1637*sinh(0.851 - 1.2638*x_1) - 8.993) - 0.0372*sin(-0.1844*sinh(0.4585 - 2.0104*x_1) + 0.2828*sinh(1.0735 - 2.0636*x_2) + 6.7332) + 0.2144*sinh(0.0636*sinh(1.3995 - 2.4576*x_1) - 0.1269*tanh(2.2132*x_2 - 3.1056) + 0.1527) - 0.4271

0.0072*(-0.072*(0.7225 - x_1)**2 + sin(1.137*x_2 - 1.136) + 0.3423)**2 + 0.0253*(0.1501*sinh(0.4585 - 2.0104*x_1) - 0.2303*sinh(1.0735 - 2.0636*x_2) - 1)**3 + 1.1196*(0.0133*sinh(1.3995 - 2.4576*x_1) - 0.0266*tanh(2.2132*x_2 - 3.1056) - 1)**2 - 0.0014*sin(-0.4953*exp(1.1856*x_1) + 1.7977*sin(1.4132*x_2 + 4.5774) + 5.1839) + 0.0335*sinh(1.2581*exp(0.8749*x_2) + 0.8892*sinh(0.851 - 1.2638*x_1) - 2.4504) + 0.226
